title: Cozy Golden Curry
description: A sweet and light Chinese dish featuring turmeric powder, fermented ingredients for depth of flavor, suitable for kosher households.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons soy sauce
ingredients.notes: low sodium or tamari for a gluten-free option

ingredients.name: 4 ounces tofu, crumbled (vegan can be used if necessary)
1 tablespoon ground ginger
ingredients.notes: ensure you have fresh ginger available or use a jar of peeled and grated ginger if not

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add coconut milk and stir to dissolve any lumps.
Stir in soy sauce, crumbled tofu, golden raisins, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic. Bring to a simmer and cook for about 5 minutes or until thickened slightly, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let cook gently on the back of the stove for another 10-20 minutes until all flavors have melded together.
Serve warm as an accompaniment to steamed vegetables or a bed of rice.
